w:r.w:t: Enterprise-Level SaaS Attendance & Shift Management System
Time, Attendance, and Shift Management System
This step focuses on who works where, when, and under what rules, ensuring compliance, auditability, and operational flexibility.
, but employees can mark attendance from:
and can be added at any time.
Used for corporate offices, sensitive areas.
Floor access is managed separately from shifts.
No shift assignment on restricted floors without access
Same department can exist across multiple SBUs.
Special Increment Percentage (for special pay scales)
GM Ops and GM Finance are
Used when internal staff is insufficient.
Vendors may or may not use the system (both supported)
